tasks.subject: Hard audit of founding spec + master plan index + Plan 01
tasks.notes: Audit ran via dispatched general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined (Path A adapted because risk-auditor isn't loadable from /srv/Nexostrat/). Returned RED with 28 findings + DESIGN-RETHINK FLAG. Report at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_audit-report.md. Walkthrough produced amendment plan at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_amendments.md. Major outcome: Plan 01 splits into 01a/01b/01c.

tasks.subject: Batch 1 — Apply spec + ADR + master index amendments
tasks.notes: Per amendment plan §Batch 1. Single-pass spec edit covering F6/F9/F10/F11/F12/F13/F14/F17/F19/F22/R3/R4/R5/R6 spec changes. Write ADR-021bis (drop Hosted), ADR-036 (Stage 1 surface area v0/v1), ADR-037 (deferred Notion review). Re-status ADRs 001-020. Rename events.json -> calendar.json. Update master plan index with 01a/b/c entries + new due dates. Flip audit-request status to RESOLVED. ~2-3 hours.

tasks.subject: Build Aurora-styled HTML presentation of all decisions
tasks.notes: User-friendly visualization of the AMENDED design for JP-readability. Same pedagogical voice as the 2026-05-12 JP v3 cheatsheet. Lands at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-XX_nexostrat-presentation.html. ~2-3 hours focused build. Blocked on Batch 1 so the presentation reflects amended spec, not stale spec.

tasks.subject: Batch 2 — Write Plans 01a / 01b / 01c via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: Per amendment plan §Batch 2. Three sequential superpowers:writing-plans runs. 01a (~15 tasks foundation), 01b (~10 tasks mirrors+standby), 01c (~10 tasks personas+hooks+integration test). Replaces current Plan 01 (archive original). Each plan inherits its share of the 28 finding amendments per the amendment plan. ~3-4 hours total writing time.

tasks.subject: Coordinate JP age keypair generation (gating prereq for Plan 01a)
tasks.notes: Per CRITICAL 2 fix. JP runs `age-keygen` on his machine; key requires passphrase (symmetric with Ricardo's posture). JP sends pubkey via Signal. Ricardo adds to infra/age-recipients.txt BEFORE any encryption happens in Plan 01a. ~10 min JP time + coordination latency.

tasks.subject: Confirm JP's machine OS (recommend Linux Mint for heavy setup)
tasks.notes: Per F13 decision. Ricardo recommending Linux Mint. If JP can/will install Mint, no macOS bootstrap work needed. If not, macOS exception path designed in Plan 02.

tasks.subject: Verify Gitea + n8n actual storage paths on HP host
tasks.notes: Per CRITICAL 4 sub-task + F22. Need: (1) Gitea bare-repo storage path (for systemd path-watcher unit in Plan 01b), (2) n8n compose location (resolve spec/Plan 01 inconsistency between /srv/atten-bot/ and /home/ricardo/n8n/). Result documented in 00_GOVERNANCE/system_map.md (created in Plan 01b).

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01a — Foundation (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Per amendment plan §Batch 3. Re-audit Plan 01a first (independent risk-auditor pass; same dispatch pattern as 2026-05-14 audit). Target: GREEN. If YELLOW with <=3 amendments, apply inline and proceed. Execute via superpowers:subagent-driven-development. Tag v0.1a-foundation on completion. Also gated on t-jp-age-keypair.

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01b — Mirrors + warm-standby (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Re-audit, then execute via subagent-driven-development. Tag v0.1b-mirrors on completion. Also gated on t-gitea-n8n-paths.

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01c — Personas + hooks + integration test (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Re-audit, then execute via subagent-driven-development. Tag v0.1-foundation on completion (the original Plan 01 milestone, now reached at end of 01c).

tasks.subject: Write Plan 02 (Documentation System) in full task detail via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: Master-index header in 00_META/plans/README.md. Plan 02's drift hook becomes simpler now that Plan 01c's inliner script (per CRITICAL 3 fix) already exists. ~3 days execute after writing.
